question: What are the most important open problems in number theory?
result_summary: Surveyed recent arxiv literature to identify major open problems in number theory. Found active research on: (1) Riemann Hypothesis and zero distribution, (2) Twin Prime Conjecture and prime gaps, (3) Goldbach Conjecture variants, (4) ABC Conjecture and connections to Diophantine equations, (5) Tamagawa number conjectures, (6) Additive number theory problems including Caccetta-Haggkvist conjecture. Recent work includes conditional results, computational approaches, and connections to physics/random matrix theory.
